title: Smoky Velvety Chicken Stir-fry
description: A smoky and velvety low-carb-friendly date-night dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, featuring five spice powder for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and season with salt and pepper.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until golden brown on all sides.
Transfer chicken to a plate. In the same pan, add red bell peppers, garlic, and green onions. Cook for about 2 minutes or until vegetables soften slightly.
Add soy sauce and five spice powder to the pan; stir well.
Return chicken to the pan with the sauce. Simmer for another 5-7 minutes.
Garnish with fresh basil leaves before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
